description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a detached double garage on the left and a driveway leading up to it. The house features a light-colored exterior with horizontal siding, a flat roof on the main structure, and a dark gable roof on the garage. The front yard is landscaped with two palm trees and a small patch of grass, bordered by a white picket fence and a concrete walkway leading to the main entrance. A red car is parked on the driveway, adding a residential touch. The upper story has a balcony with a white railing, and the windows are arranged in a simple, functional pattern.
description: A modern two-story house with a detached garage, palm trees, a balcony, and a driveway with a red car.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double garage, driveway, red car, palm trees, and balcony.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the side windows, white picket fence, and partial view of the car and palm trees.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the house and garage, with minimal visible landscaping or windows.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the garage roof, side of the house, driveway, and palm trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a small porch, white picket fence, concrete walkway, and flanked by palm trees.
